name: NR Instant Produce Public Company Limited
summary: NR Instant Produce Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes seasonings and instant food products in Thailand, the United States, Europe, Asia, and internationally. The company offers sauces, condiments, and curries under the Por Kwan brand; soups, pastes, sauces, and condiments under the Lee brand; ready to eat meals under the Thai Delight brand; and teas under the Dede brand. It also provides co-packing services and private label products. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Samut Sakhon, Thailand.
